---
title: "foer_besoegsdag_4"
subtitle: "`foer_besoegsdag_4`"
description: "foer_besoegsdag_4"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/foer_besoegsdag_4/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                    | Title                        | Type   | Description                                                                                                 |
|-------------------------|------------------------------|--------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                 | The unique name of the event | string | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                          |
| `center`                | Research center              | string | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                       |
| `book_bloodsample_wfv4` | book_bloodsample_wfv4        | string | Indicates if bloodsamples have been ordered for the participant. Workflow. Visit 4.                         |
| `medicin_print_wfv4`    | medicin_print_wfv4           | string | Whether the participant's medication list has been printed in preparation for the visit. Workflow. Visit 4. |

: Fields in the `foer_besoegsdag_4` resource.
